title: Yahats #3096
definition:
Jahaz or Jahazah or Jahzah = "trodden down"

 1) a place in Reuben east of the Dead Sea where Israel defeated Sihon
    king of the Amorites; site uncertain
nasbUsage:

    king of the Amorites; site uncertain
